title: Smoky Gooey Ethiopian Chickpeas Stir-fry
description: A flavorful and hearty one-pot dish that combines tender chickpeas with a smoky flavor from smoked paprika and a gooey texture achieved through the use of ground allspice.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add garlic cloves and sauté until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add chickpeas to the pan along with salt, smoked paprika, ground allspice, and red pepper flakes. Stir well to coat the chickpeas evenly.
Stir in chopped basil leaves just before serving for added freshness.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the chickpeas are heated through and slightly crispy on the edges.
